data[0] = 32'b00000000000000000000_00001_0010111; // auipc x1, 0
data[1] = 32'b00010010001101000101_00010_0110111; // lui   x2, 0x12345
data[2] = 32'b00000000100000000000_00011_1101111; // jal   x3, L1
data[3] = 32'b000000000001_00000_000_00100_0010011; // addi  x4, x0, 1   (skipped)
data[4] = 32'b000000000010_00000_000_00100_0010011; // L1: addi x4, x0, 2
data[5] = 32'b0100000_00001_00011_000_00101_0110011; // sub   x5, x3, x1
data[6] = 32'b0000100_00010_00000_010_00000_0100011; // sw x2, 128(x0)
data[7] = 32'b0000100_00100_00000_010_00100_0100011; // sw x4, 132(x0)
data[8] = 32'b0000100_00101_00000_010_01000_0100011; // sw x5, 136(x0)
